Video.summary: Rachel's in labor and about to give birth at any minute with only Cyd to support her because Tony is literally out on a ledge trying to stop a troubled, older cop, who is a friend, from jumping.
Video.title: A Time To Be Born

Video.summary: As Halloween approaches, a heart is cut from the body of a corpse at a funeral home and concerned Eastbridge parents pressure Tony to protect their children from the suspect, an eccentric recluse.
Video.title: The Witches Of Eastbridge

Video.summary: Tony, distraught when it appears that Phil Reid, one of his best men, may be targeted for revenge by a dangerous escaped convict.
Video.title: Escape

Video.summary: Tony is torn when a series of life-threatening incidents occur in Eastbridge and the only link appears to be Ed Mize, an old, mild-mannered friend currently experiencing marital difficulties.
Video.title: The Two Faces Of Ed

Video.summary: While grocery shopping, Rachel runs head-on into a robbery-murder suspect -- and becomes the target of the killer's threats.
Video.title: Witness

Video.summary: When Reno walks into a museum robbery in progress while meeting with Judge Sarah Jessup, both he and the judge are "introduced" to disillusioned Special Investigations cop, Carrick O'Quinn.
Video.title: Carrick O'Quinn

Video.summary: Reno's freedom appears within reach when he goes after his nemesis Lt. Dutch Dixon who is wanted for the murder of his own partner.
Video.title: Dutch On The Run

Video.summary: When Reno stands trial for the murder of Buzzy Burrell, his quest for justice is complicated by Lt. Dutch Dixon who plans to insure that Reno never makes it to court alive.
Video.title: The Trial Of Reno Raines

Video.summary: As Reno waits out his pending appeal for murder, he is transfered to Paso Perdido Penitentiary where he finds himself in danger from the prison population as well as the law.
Video.title: Escape

Video.summary: When Reno is saved during a bar fight by a man strongly resembling Elvis Presley, he attempts to track down "the King" to express his thanks as well as satisfy his curiosity.
Video.title: The King And I

Video.summary: Reno goes to the aid of his Karate Master when one of the master's former pupils attacks a San Francisco councilwoman.
Video.title: Black Wind

Video.summary: When Reno goes to New Orleans after cold-blooded murderer, he finds himself the recipient of a "dead man's curse".
Video.title: Way Down Yonder In New Orleans

Image.alt: Way Down Yonder In New Orleans
Way Down Yonder In New Orleans
Way Down Yonder In New Orleans

Video.summary: The five-year old disappearance of B-movie starlet sends Reno south of the border, following a hot tip from one of Bobby's informants.
Video.title: The Hot Tip

Video.summary: When crooked Circuit Prosecutor Eli Starke hires some local thugs to thwart the efforts of a group of ex-convicts trying to go straight, Reno comes to their rescue.
Video.title: Moody River

Video.summary: Reno's old friend, D.A. Harry Wells, recruits him to help find his daughter Dawn, who is being held hostage by her drug-dealing boyfriend.
Video.title: Vanished

Video.summary: A group of determined young college graduates extort wealthy businessman.
Video.title: Dream Weavers

Video.summary: As things between Tom and his girlfriend heat up. they begin looking for a new place to live together.
Video.title: Noir (Part 1)

Video.summary: Tom finds he's been set up as he struggles to clear his name in a murder investigation.
Video.title: Noir (Part 2)

Video.summary: Homicide detectives Rita Lee Lance and Chris Lorenzo investigate the murder of a beautiful model.
Video.title: Pilot

Video.summary: A dead call girl and the wealthy victim of an apparent heart attack send Rita and Chris undercover.
Video.title: Going To Babylon

Video.summary: The death of a wealthy Palm Beach socialite leads Rita and Chris to a devious blackmail/extortion plot.
Video.title: S.O.B.

Video.summary: Cassy's sister witnesses a mob hit and becomes the killer's next target.
Video.title: Blue Collars

Video.summary: The murder of a motivational speaker points to his competition as the guilty party.
Video.title: Peak Experience

Video.summary: Cassy investigates the death of a teenage boy she used to baby-sit.
Video.title: The Babysitter

Video.summary: The murder of a dead gym owner points to her wealthy fiancee and a former business pastner.
Video.title: Pumped Up

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy pursue a serial killer whose victims are culled from the Internet.
Video.title: callme@murder.com

Video.summary: After a former partner she accused of corruption is killed, Cassy suspects his involvement in the theft of $10 million.
Video.title: Exit The Dragon
